steps: Go to https://cloud.typesense.org and sign up or log in
Click 'Launch a New Cluster' to create a Typesense Cloud cluster
Choose a configuration (RAM, CPU, region) — a free tier is available
Wait for the cluster to provision (a few minutes)
Once the cluster is running, click on it in the dashboard
Click 'Generate API Keys' to generate the admin and search-only API keys
Copy the admin API key and the cluster hostname for use in requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Admin API Key
credential_fields.description: Typesense admin API key passed in the X-TYPESENSE-API-KEY header

notes: Typesense Cloud offers a free tier for development clusters
Self-hosted Typesense is also available — the API key is set in server configuration
Use the admin API key for full access; use the search-only key for client-side search
The cluster hostname is unique per cluster (e.g. xxx.a1.typesense.net)
API keys are sent in the X-TYPESENSE-API-KEY header, not Authorization

test_endpoint.description: Check if the Typesense server is healthy and ready to accept requests
